creator: jim@blues.ghis.net
text:
Port updates the ascd port to the latest version.  Quite a few updates
from 0.12.1..

   * Updated my email address in the MAINTAINER field
   * Updated LIB_DEPENDS to include libworkman (see ports/13023)
   * Themes are now in a separate tarball
   * Removed patch-ac, patch-ad, and patch-af since they included bits for
     libworkman and are no longer needed

Fix: 

A gzipped diff is available at http://www.ghis.net/~jim/ascd.diff.gz.
